# Parity fixtures (v1)

This directory holds the golden artifacts the parity tests compare against.
Generated by `tools/xfeat-regen-fixtures` from the upstream XFeat PyTorch model.

## What's here (when fully populated)

| File | Format | What |
|---|---|---|
| `MANIFEST.toml` | TOML | upstream commit pin, tolerances |
| `input.png` | PNG | canonical input image (480×640 mono) |
| `input_preprocessed.safetensors` | safetensors | post-`align_to_32` + InstanceNorm f32 |
| `expected_dense.safetensors` | safetensors | `keypoint_logits`, `descriptor`, `reliability` dense maps |
| `expected_sparse.json` | JSON | post-NMS top-K keypoints + descriptors + scores |

## Regenerating

```bash
cd tools/xfeat-regen-fixtures
pip install -r requirements.txt
python regen.py --output ../../tests/fixtures/v1
```

This is the **only** way fixtures should change. Re-running re-bumps
`MANIFEST.toml`. Committing the result is a separate, reviewed step.

## Why most files are missing right now

The first regen-script run hasn't happened yet — placeholder fixtures only.
Parity tests are written to gracefully skip when `expected_dense.safetensors`
is absent so CI stays green during scaffold work; once the fixtures land,
the tests start enforcing parity automatically.
